documentation.description: Optical flow from a flow sensor (e.g. optical mouse sensor)

record_types.name: Optical_Flow

fields.name: Time_Usec
fields.description:
Units: [us]
Timestamp (UNIX Epoch time or time since system boot). The receiving
end can infer timestamp format (since 1.1.1970 or since system boot)
by checking for the magnitude of the number.

fields.name: Flow_Comp_M_X
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
Flow in x-sensor direction, angular-speed compensated

fields.name: Flow_Comp_M_Y
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
Flow in y-sensor direction, angular-speed compensated

fields.name: Quality
fields.description: Optical flow quality / confidence. 0: bad, 255: maximum quality

fields.name: Ground_Distance
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Ground distance. Positive value: distance known. Negative value:
Unknown distance

fields.name: Flow_Rate_X
fields.description:
Units: [rad/s]
Flow rate about X axis

fields.name: Flow_Rate_Y
fields.description:
Units: [rad/s]
Flow rate about Y axis
